name: lhps.org
message: Founded in 1970, Lake Highland Preparatory School is the 8th largest coeducational independent day school in the nation, featuring two campuses totaling forty-two acres in the heart of Orlando. LHPS educates approximately 1,950 students in grades Pre-K though 12 in a rigorous college preparatory program. The school is accredited by Florida Council of Independent Schools, Southern Association of Colleges and Schools and Florida Kindergarten Council.
